was employed in a Government
Ven.
concern.

Mars Dh.
CHART 211
Sat. Sun The native will have two broth
Jupt. Yen. ers and four sisters. He will have rev
Dt. Mer. erence for elders and teamed persons.
He will come to own riches. He will
have one son and one daughter.
The Sun is conjunct Mercury in
Mars
Taurus and there are no planets there
- after in four houses. So, the father will
Dh.
be a teacher and later on take to oil
Moon
marketing. The native will be married
between 18-21 years of age. Mars representing the husband of the native is in
exaltation and Saturn is in Aries and so they have exchanged places. There
fore, the native will get a partner who will become rich after marriage. The
native will own a house between 40-45 years and happy functions will be
celebrated at home. When the native is 39-40, the husband will come to own
lands and have own house between 43-44. They will then have several
sources of income.
